chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-320 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge For order as to non-prosecution 29.1.2026 Mr. Talha Abbasi advocate for the petitioner --------------------- Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
